summary: Comprehensive testing of Panacée CRM - All backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Auth, Dashboard, Leads, Marathons, Promesses, Ranking, Reports, Users pages all functional. Mobile-first responsive design verified.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during backend testing (TEST_Jean Pierre, TEST_Update Lead)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend has 24 pytest tests covering Auth, Users, Formations, Marathons, Leads, Dashboard, Ranking, Reports, Promises, and Time Remaining endpoints. Frontend tested with Playwright covering login flow, marathon selection, dashboard stats, leads CRUD, navigation (desktop sidebar + mobile bottom nav), and all admin pages.

login.valid_admin_code: PASS - 839271 returns token and user info, redirects to marathon selection
login.valid_vendeur_code: PASS - 1284 works and shows vendeur dashboard

marathon_selection.selection_redirects: PASS - Redirects to dashboard after selection

dashboard.stats_display: PASS - Total leads, inscrits, conversion rate, objectif, progress bar all shown
dashboard.admin_filters: PASS - Vendeur and period filters present
dashboard.vendeur_stats_table: PASS - Per-vendeur performance table shown for admin

leads.list_display: PASS - Shows existing leads with proper info
leads.status_badges: PASS - Très intéressé (light green), Inscrit (dark green)

features_tested.marathons_page: PASS - Shows marathons list with objectives
features_tested.ranking_page: PASS - Shows vendeur ranking by inscrits with podium
features_tested.reports_page: PASS - Shows charts and vendeur stats
features_tested.users_page: PASS - Shows all users with roles
